## [33:33 - 36:36]

to test on Thursday, but I would not test multiple offers ever in a Facebook campaign. So any Facebook campaign that you guys build, you want to make sure that all of the ads in that campaign are sending traffic to the same URL and optimizing for the same, you know, objective, right? Or optimization goal, everything that you're selecting.
